root_cause: Recognized sidecar restarts are cascading into main container restarts
evidence: Recognized sidecar 'istio-proxy' has restartCount=2 while primary container 'checkout' has restartCount=2
Timeline shows 2 ordered sidecar-restart -> main-restart cascade sequence(s) within the last 20 minutes
Total coalesced cascade strength across matched sequences: 2 occurrence(s)
Representative cascade gap between sidecar restart signal and main restart was about 70s
Representative sidecar restart signal: Container istio-proxy failed startup probe, will be restarted
Representative main restart signal: Container checkout failed liveness probe, will be restarted

causes.message: Container 'istio-proxy' is acting as a sidecar alongside the primary workload
Recent kubelet events show restart pressure for sidecar 'istio-proxy'
Main container 'checkout' restarts shortly after sidecar 'istio-proxy' restart episodes
Pod stability is degraded because sidecar restart episodes propagate into the main workload

pod:checkout-api-66d49d8b74-ctsmv: Ordered kubelet events show sidecar restart activity preceding main-container restarts in the same incident window
container:istio-proxy: Container restartCount=2 with recent sidecar-specific restart signals
Container istio-proxy failed startup probe, will be restarted
container:checkout: Container restartCount=2 with restart signals that follow sidecar disruption
Container checkout failed liveness probe, will be restarted

likely_causes: The main workload is tightly coupled to a proxy or agent sidecar and does not tolerate short sidecar outages
Sidecar bootstrap, certificate rotation, or config reload is unstable and repeatedly disrupts the application's health path
Application liveness or startup behavior fails closed when the supporting sidecar is briefly unavailable
suggested_checks: Compare main-container liveness or startup failures against sidecar restart timestamps
Review whether the application can degrade gracefully when the sidecar restarts instead of immediately failing health checks
